transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Is the study group meeting tonight or tomorrow?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Tomorrow. It was rescheduled because several students had another class tonight.

transcript.question_intro: Why was the study group rescheduled?

questions.prompt: Why was the study group rescheduled?

choices.text: Several students had a class conflict.

questions.explanation: The woman says several students had another class tonight.
questions.evidence: Several students had another class tonight.
